summary: Comprehensive testing of Beleg-Upload (file attachments) feature for Buchungen. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Paperclip icon button per buchung, Hilfe overlay 'Belege anhängen' section with complete documentation.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege uploads PDF file successfully
Backend: POST /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege uploads JPG image successfully
Backend: POST /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege uploads TXT file successfully
Backend: POST /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege uploads XLSX file successfully
Backend: GET /api/buchhaltung/belege/{beleg_id}/download returns file with correct content
Backend: GET /api/buchhaltung/belege/{beleg_id}/download returns correct Content-Type header
Backend: GET /api/buchhaltung/belege/{beleg_id}/download returns correct Content-Disposition header
Backend: GET /api/buchhaltung/belege/nonexistent/download returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege/{beleg_id} removes beleg successfully
Backend: DELETE verifies beleg is no longer downloadable after deletion
Backend: DELETE /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: Upload rejects .exe files with 400 error
Backend: Upload rejects .js files with 400 error
Backend: Upload rejects .php files with 400 error
Backend: Upload to non-existent buchung returns 404
Backend: Multiple belege (3) can be attached to single buchung
Backend: GET /api/buchhaltung/buchungen returns belege array with all attached files
Backend: GET /api/buchhaltung/export-csv includes 'Belege' column in header
Backend: CSV export includes comma-separated beleg filenames in Belege column
Backend: All beleg endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Frontend: Buchungen tab shows Paperclip icon button per buchung
Frontend: Paperclip button has correct data-testid (btn-beleg-{buchung_id})
Frontend: Hilfe overlay has 'Belege anhängen' accordion section
Frontend: Hilfe 'Belege anhängen' section mentions Büroklammer-Symbol
Frontend: Hilfe 'Belege anhängen' section lists allowed file types (JPG, PNG, PDF, Word, Excel)
Frontend: Hilfe 'Belege anhängen' section mentions multiple belege per buchung
Frontend: Hilfe 'Belege anhängen' section mentions download and delete functionality
Frontend: Hilfe 'Belege anhängen' section mentions CSV-Export includes beleg filenames
critical_code_review_comments: Beleg upload correctly validates file extensions against ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS set
Beleg metadata stored in MongoDB as array on buchung document with id, storage_path, original_filename, content_type, size, created_at
CSV export correctly joins beleg filenames with comma separator
Download endpoint uses MongoDB projection to find beleg by id across all buchungen
Delete endpoint uses $pull operator to remove beleg from array
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Beleg_Upload_Buchung, TEST_Multiple_Belege, TEST_CSV_Belege_Export, TEST_Beleg_Frontend_Test buchungen for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beleg-Upload feature fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege (upload), GET /api/buchhaltung/belege/{id}/download (download), DELETE /api/buchhaltung/buchungen/{id}/belege/{id} (delete). Allowed extensions: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, pdf, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, csv, txt. Max size: 10MB. Belege stored in Emergent Object Storage. Frontend data-testids: btn-beleg-{buchung_id} (paperclip button), beleg-{beleg_id} (blue tag). Hilfe section: hilfe-belege. CSV export includes 'Belege' column with comma-separated filenames.
